title: zornia tetraphylla var. linearis
intro: Zornia tetraphylla var. linearis, also known as Linearleaf Zornia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zornia tetraphylla var. linearis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antiviral and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
